login.title: Sign in to your AI workspace
login.subtitle: Use email and password, or a trusted OAuth provider, to continue to downloads, support contributions, certificates, and your dashboard.
login.privacyNote: Your account keeps contribution records, certificates, and dashboard settings tied to you.
login.humanVerificationError: Verify that you are human and try again.
login.registrationSuccess: Check your email to verify your account before signing in.
login.registrationRateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.
login.signInError: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.
login.signUpError: Could not create the account. Check your email and password.
login.oauthError: Could not start sign in. Try another provider or use email.
login.callbackError: The sign-in link could not be verified. Please try again.
login.passwordResetComplete: Password updated. You can now sign in.
login.passwordResetError: Could not send the reset email. Check the address and try again.
login.passwordResetSent: Check your email for a password reset link.

home.title: GitBook AI
home.subtitle: Download the AI-powered coding book companion for structured programming knowledge, release notes, and developer learning workflows.
home.supportPrompt: Downloads stay free. Voluntary support keeps the AI knowledge engine improving.
home.featureOneText: Navigate code concepts, notes, and book-like knowledge with a focused software interface.
home.featureTwoText: Fast downloads, predictable releases, and a dashboard for certificates and supporter history.
home.featureThreeText: English-first with Chinese, Japanese, and Korean routes for international users.

versions.title: Older versions
versions.subtitle: Download previous GitBook AI builds for macOS and Windows.
versions.empty: No public releases have been published yet.

donate.title: Contribute to GitBook AI
donate.subtitle: Choose a one-time contribution to support product releases, AI knowledge updates, cloud sync infrastructure, and supporter certificates.
donate.oneTimeNote: A one-time contribution that helps keep downloads available and development moving.
donate.paymentNote: Secure checkout with Dodo Payments for cards and supported local payment methods. A certificate is issued after successful payment.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Read product updates, service notices, and account-related announcements.
notifications.empty: No notifications are available right now.

support.title: Help and feedback
support.subtitle: Use chat channels for the fastest help, or send account issue details through the feedback form.
support.channelsEmpty: No chat channels are configured yet.
support.subject: Subject
support.success: Feedback sent. We will review it soon.
support.error: Could not send feedback. Please try again.
support.signInRequiredDescription: Feedback is tied to your account so administrators can reply and continue the conversation with you.
support.replyPlaceholder: Add more context or answer the administrator...

dashboard.title: Personal center

trial.title: Trial code
trial.description: Redeem a team-provided code to start a 3-day cloud sync trial.
trial.bindingHelp: The 3-day trial starts immediately after redemption. When you sign in to GitBook AI on your computer, the app will securely bind this trial to that computer automatically.
trial.invalid: The trial code or selected device is invalid.
trial.inactive: This trial code is not active.
trial.limit: This trial code has reached its redemption limit.
trial.machineUsed: This computer has already used a cloud sync trial.
trial.duplicate: This account has already redeemed this trial code.
trial.error: Could not redeem the trial code.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage cloud sync access, trial codes, contribution history, certificates, and account security in one place.
dashboard.accessNotActive: No active cloud sync access yet

overview.title: Admin
overview.donationsDescription: Review contribution records, statuses, and transaction IDs.
overview.certificatesDescription: Review issued certificate numbers, types, statuses, and issue dates.
overview.releasesDescription: Upload macOS and Windows installers, publish versions, and manage release notes.
overview.supportFeedbackDescription: Review account issue reports and support requests.
overview.licensesDescription: Create trial codes, review entitlements, and revoke desktop cloud sync access.
overview.usersDescription: Review user status, trial bindings, desktop devices, and operator roles.
overview.auditLogsDescription: Review admin corrections, revocations, and reasons.
overview.description: Manage contributions, certificates, releases, licenses, users, and audit activity.

releases.title: Software releases
releases.deliveryModeFileHelp: Upload one installer for macOS and one for Windows.
releases.deliveryModeLinkHelp: Provide primary download links for both platforms. Backup links are optional.
releases.description: Upload installers and control public release availability.

donations.title: Admin contributions
donations.manualEntryDescription: Create one paid manual record for an existing user by email or user ID.
donations.description: Review payment records and add verified manual contributions.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Publish in-app announcements for public visitors, signed-in users, or admins.

supportFeedback.title: Support feedback
supportFeedback.description: Review account issue reports submitted through the support page.
supportFeedback.subject: Subject
supportFeedback.replyPlaceholder: Write a clear reply for the user...

supportSettings.title: Support settings
supportSettings.description: Manage the public contact methods shown on the Support page. Enable only the channels you actively monitor.
supportSettings.sortOrderHelp: Smaller numbers appear first in the public channel list.
supportSettings.statusHelp: Switch this channel on only when the value is ready for public display.
supportSettings.valueHintTelegram: Use a full Telegram URL such as https://t.me/your_channel
supportSettings.valueHintDiscord: Use a full invite or server URL such as https://discord.gg/your-community
supportSettings.valueHintQQ: Use the public QQ number users should contact
supportSettings.valueHintEmail: Use the public mailbox users should email for support
supportSettings.valueHintWeChat: Use the public WeChat ID users should add
supportSettings.rowSavedDescription: This channel has been updated successfully.
supportSettings.guidanceBody: Enabled channels are shown publicly on the Support page. Use full URLs for Telegram and Discord, plain account identifiers for QQ or WeChat, and a valid mailbox for Email.
supportSettings.emailHelp: This is the public support mailbox shown to users. It is separate from account login email settings.
supportSettings.previewDescription: Edit each support channel below. Enabled entries will appear publicly in the configured order.
supportSettings.publicPreviewDescription: This is how the enabled support channels will appear to visitors on the Support page.
supportSettings.previewEmpty: No support contact channels are enabled yet.

certificates.title: Admin certificates
certificates.description: Review issued certificates and revoke records when needed.

auditLogs.title: Audit logs
auditLogs.description: Review administrative changes and support actions.

licenses.title: License management
licenses.createTrialDescription: Create one auto-generated cloud sync trial code. Trials default to 3 days and can be set up to 7 days.
licenses.batchGenerateDescription: Generate 1-month, 3-month, or 1-year license codes. Codes are encrypted and become valid from the redemption moment.
licenses.bulkActionsDescription: Select license codes to soft-delete them or add/reduce validity days with an audit reason.
licenses.label: Label
licenses.activationStartsOnRedeem: No activation window is needed. Validity starts when the user redeems the code.
licenses.revealHelp: Reveal only when sending this code to a user. The view is audited.
licenses.description: Manage trial codes, trial bindings, entitlements, desktop sessions, and cloud sync leases.

users.title: User management
users.detailDescription: Review and maintain one user's profile, contributions, certificates, trials, devices, and entitlements.
users.searchPlaceholder: Email, display name, or user ID
users.emptyFiltered: No users match the current filters.
users.dangerDescription: Permanently deleting a user removes the profile and cannot be undone.
users.dangerWarning: Only use this when the account must be fully erased.
users.deleteConfirmation: Type DELETE or the user email to confirm
users.description: Review account roles, statuses, trial bindings, and desktop devices.

certificate.title: Certificate of Appreciation
certificate.description: This certificate is presented with gratitude for meaningful support of independent software development.

download.title: Download certificate
download.note: Current exports are SVG only. Open the file in your browser to print or save as PDF; native PNG/PDF export is planned for a later release.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your GitBook AI account.
resetPassword.error: Could not update your password. Open the latest reset email link and try again.
